name: Chicken with Angel Hair Pasta
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Angel hair pasta -- cooked as directed
recipeInstructions:
1. Pound chicken breasts between plastic wrap until 1/4 inch thick.
2. Heat butter and olive oil in a large frying pan over medium heat.
3. Dip chicken first in scrambled eggs, then coat with bread crumbs.
4. Melt butter in the hot pan and add olive oil and crushed garlic. Cook for just a minute, stirring occasionally.
5. Add chicken breasts to the pan and fry until browned and cooked through.
6. Make nests of cooked pasta on serving plates.
7. Place one cooked chicken breast in each nest.
8. Spoon some pasta sauce over the chicken.
9. Sprinkle mozzarella, cheddar, and Colby cheese evenly over the chicken.
10. Cover with foil and broil until the cheese is melted.
Recipe By: k meade
